sources.quote: You will need to follow a rehabilitation program for 4 to 6 months.

factsExtracted.value: Physical therapy program after ACL reconstruction; the ACL connects the shin bone (tibia) to the thigh bone (femur).
You will need to follow a rehabilitation program for 4 to 6 months.
Knee that gives way or feels unstable during daily activities; inability to return to sports or other activities.
Full return to activities and sports often takes 4 to 6 months; quick-direction sports may require 9 to 12 months.
Patients may need to wear a knee brace for the first 1 to 6 weeks, limiting certain activities.
